title: Soil and Water Management—The Key to Production in Rainfed Agriculture of Semi-Arid Tropics
abstract:
The Semi-Arid Tropics of the world are
characterised by shQrt wet period and long
dry periods. The evapotranspiration
demand of the climate far exceeds the precipitation
for most part of the year.
According to Troll (1966), the areas characterised
by 2At wet months (P> ET) and
10 to 7t dry months are classified as dry
semi-arid tropics whereas 4-7 wet months
and 8-5 dry months are considered humid
semi-arid tropics...
publication: Journal of the Indian Sociely of Soii Science
